questions.question: Which master data object contains the list of components required to manufacture a product?
Which transaction code is commonly used to create a Production Order?

Which transaction code is used to record a Usage Decision?

Which SAP module manages employee information and payroll?
Which transaction code is used to create an Inspection Plan?
Which SAP component is responsible for user administration and system monitoring?
Which transaction code is used to maintain SAP users?
What is the primary objective of SAP Security?
options: Control user access and protect business data
questions.correct_answer: Control user access and protect business data

questions.question: A Routing defines the sequence of manufacturing operations.

Production Version links BOM and Routing.
SAP BASIS is mainly responsible for technical administration of SAP systems.
Inspection Plans define how quality inspections should be carried out.
Anyone can access all SAP transactions without authorization.
